sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
Mother Mary Pyrite Idol – Blessings, Protection & Prosperity

Invite divine grace, love, and abundance into your home with the Mother Mary Pyrite Idol. A sacred symbol of compassion and protection, this idol is beautifully crafted and infused with the powerful vibrations of authentic Pyrite crystals. Representing both spiritual blessings and material prosperity, it is perfect for creating an aura of peace and positivity in your home or workplace.

✨ Bring home the grace of Mother Mary with the prosperity of Pyrite – Shop the Mother Mary Pyrite Idol today!

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
The Mother Mary Pyrite Idol is more than just a décor piece – it is a spiritual energy source.

Mother Mary’s Blessings: Symbol of divine love, protection, and guidance.

Pyrite Crystal Energy: Known as the “Crystal of Abundance,” Pyrite attracts wealth, financial growth, and shields against negativity.

Healing Aura: Brings harmony, emotional balance, and spiritual protection to any space.

According to Vastu and Feng Shui, placing this idol in your living room, prayer area, or workspace ensures an inflow of positive energy, prosperity, and blessings of Mother Mary.

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text: ✡ Pyrite – Known as Fool’s Gold, Pyrite forms deep inside the earth where iron and sulfur come together under the right conditions. Sometimes, even nature’s tiny bacteria help create this sparkling crystal. It’s admired for its shine and energy that attracts positivity, abundance, and confidence.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Brings love, peace, and compassion.
